# Digital Charter Implementation Act, 2022 (Bill C-27)

Jurisdiction: Canada
Region: CA
Citation: Digital Charter Implementation Act, 2022
Authority: Parliament of Canada
Source URL: https://www.parl.ca/DocumentViewer/en/44-1/bill/C-27/first-reading
Topics: lawful_basis, notice_transparency, data_subject_rights, automated_decision_making, accountability
Keywords: CPPA, AIDA, Digital Charter Implementation Act, Bill C-27

## Summary
Canadian federal privacy and AI bill package proposed to replace PIPEDA with CPPA and create AI governance rules; track as non-enacted unless status changes.

## Key compliance obligations
- Do not treat as enacted law until legislative status changes.
- Use as roadmap for future CPPA/AIDA requirements.
- Monitor automated decision and AI governance proposals.
